disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sudden-onset severe generalised abdominal pain that began about 4 hours ago as a dull ache and rapidly became sharp and constant
trigger_question_examples: When did the pain start and how did it come on?
Where is the pain and what does it feel like?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It started about four hours ago as a dull ache and then very quickly became a sharp, constant pain across my whole belly.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Pain is markedly worsened by any movement or deep breathing and relieved only by lying completely still; the patient breathes shallowly to avoid moving the abdomen
trigger_question_examples: Does anything make the pain better or worse?
What happens if you move or take a deep breath?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: If I move at all or take a deep breath it's agony, so I'm lying dead still and only breathing shallowly. Staying completely still is the only thing that helps.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Concurrent nausea with two episodes of vomiting
trigger_question_examples: Have you felt sick or vomited?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, I've felt really sick and I've thrown up twice.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Subjective fever and feeling sweaty and flushed
trigger_question_examples: Do you feel feverish or hot?
Have you had any chills or sweats?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I feel really hot and sweaty, like I've got a fever.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Unable to mobilise at all because of pain severity — bedbound since onset
trigger_question_examples: Are you able to get up or walk?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I can't get up at all, I'm stuck in bed — it hurts far too much to move.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No flank-to-groin radiation of the pain, and the patient lies still rather than restlessly moving to find comfort
trigger_question_examples: Does the pain travel down towards your groin or back?
Do you feel like moving around might ease it, or is staying still better?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, it doesn't shoot down to my groin or back. Moving makes it worse, so I just lie still.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No cough or chest congestion; breathing is shallow only because deep breaths hurt the abdomen
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any cough or chest symptoms?
Is the shallow breathing because of your chest or because of the belly pain?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No cough or anything in my chest — I'm only breathing shallowly because a deep breath makes my stomach hurt so much.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No recent anti-inflammatory (NSAID) or regular medication use reported
trigger_question_examples: Have you taken any anti-inflammatories or painkillers recently?
Are you on any regular medications?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I haven't taken any anti-inflammatories and I'm not on any regular tablets.
